fieldguide.entity.jaizmobs.soulwader.des: Megafauna of the Soul Sand Valleys, Soulwaders are gorgeous beasts who shepard souls through the hostile Nether. When slain, they drop bone shards, which can create a skull in their likeness.
fieldguide.entity.jaizmobs.snail.descrip: Legends tell of snails who could fell immortal warriors with only a touch. These snails won't do that. I'm pretty sure. I wouldn't risk it.
fieldguide.entity.jaizmobs.cultivator.de: A large, friendly, hulking beast, the Cultivator has a back covered in organic pots and rich soil. As it wanders through Cherry Groves, diverse and unique seeds will lossen from it's hide.
fieldguide.entity.jaizmobs.aeroblob.desc: Found aimlessly floating in the end, The Aeroblob is a useful creature that can be mounted and controlled with Starfish. They drop Helium Membranes, a food source, and slowly sink while being flown.
fieldguide.entity.jaizmobs.molotov_golem: Coming to life in Basalt Deltas, Molotov Golems are explosive and aggressive mobs that drop sulfur and gunpowder.
fieldguide.entity.jaizmobs.driplet.descr: Endemic to Dripstone Caves, the Driplet is a small collection of dripstone given life. It can drop dripstone shards, which can create a brittle but powerful weapon.
fieldguide.entity.jaizmobs.stalagtitan.d: Endemic to Dripstone Caves, the Stalagtitan is what happens when Driplets hoard together. Beware their long arms and hostile dispositions. They drop dripstone shards.
Large berries that can found on Warped Forest floors. They can be eaten after being cultivated, but they explode when stepped on. Take care!
fieldguide.entity.jaizmobs.frosted_totem: Native to colder environments, the Frosted Totem Spirit drops ice, sherds on occasion, and slows the player when it attacks.
fieldguide.entity.jaizmobs.enderwing.des: When there are shadows in The End, this is the culprit. Large, flying beasts with a taste for blood, these creatures are relentless. If you can defeat them, they will drop tattered wings, which can create the coveted Elytra.
fieldguide.entity.jaizmobs.starfishleade: Larger variant of the Starfish that can drop Helium Membranes. Their light can be seen for millenia after it is shed.
fieldguide.entity.jaizmobs.sporetrap.des: Sporetraps lurk in Lush Caves and the Jungle floor. Their jaws can snap through even armored foes, but they trod slowly. They drop glow berries and spore blossoms.
fieldguide.entity.jaizmobs.warped_truffl: Small fungifolk found in Warped Forests, Trufflers are an adorable source of mushroomy meals if you have the heart to hack them down.
fieldguide.entity.jaizmobs.calcite_golem: On Story Shores and Stony Peaks, the Calcite Golem can appear. These contructs love amethyst, and will fight valiantly for any who give it to them. When defeated, simply restore them with Amethyst to regain your companion.
fieldguide.entity.jaizmobs.crimson_truff: Small fungifolk found in Crimson Forests, Trufflers are an adorable source of mushroomy meals if you have the heart to hack them down.
fieldguide.entity.jaizmobs.strider_hunte: Strider Hunters live up to their namesakes, living in Nether Wastes, mauling striders with their mandibles and dropping hearty meat that can be feasted upon.
fieldguide.entity.jaizmobs.jungle_totem_: Spawning in jungles and forests, Jungle Totem Spirits are hosile, drop different kinds of wood and sometimes have sherds trapped within their bark.
fieldguide.entity.jaizmobs.voidbull.desc: Void Bulls are king in the End Islands. With a towering amount of health, no regard for ledges and a propensity for ramming things as hard as they can, they will fling you into the void without a second thought. Their husks though, carry powerful magic.
fieldguide.entity.jaizmobs.pine_giant.de: In places where mushrooms can sprout, the Pine Giant stalks. Easily confused for the trunks of spruce trees, they will hunt any player who may disturb the ecosystem.
fieldguide.entity.jaizmobs.desert_totem_: The Desert Totem spirit appears in arid places, pursuing players. Sometimes their sand coalesces into sherds below the skin.
fieldguide.entity.jaizmobs.starfish.desc: Bioluminescent creatures who call the End home, they can be hunted, cooked and eaten. Enjoy the beautiful lights they provide as you sit in the endless sky.
fieldguide.entity.jaizmobs.hunter_eel.de: Spawning alongside Klephtopods in Warm Oceans and other aquatic biomes, Hunter Eels are brutish hunters of the oceans, attacking Dolphins and Fish. They can be slain, cooked and eaten as you would expect.
fieldguide.entity.jaizmobs.klephtopod.de: Klephtopods are aquatic hunters that have immeasurable stamina. They pursue Hunter Eels, can even be saddled and lured with an Eel on a stick, and drop scutes which can be crafted into makeshift armor.
Found in droves in the Nether, Ember Beetles are distantly related to fireflies. When slain, they drop their incandescent butts.
The basic Totem Spirit. Spawns at night, attacks players, and can drop unique blocks and pottery sherds.
